Benchmark Results

Comprehensive performance analysis and visualization of degradation recognition methods.

Overall Accuracy

87.3%

↑ 12.4% vs baseline

F1-Score

85.6%

↑ 10.8% vs baseline

Unknown Detection

92.1%

↑ 15.2% AUROC improvement

Method Comparison

Method Accuracy F1-Score AUROC Parameters
DPL (Ours)
87.3% 85.6% 92.1% 86.2M
CLIP 74.9% 74.8% 76.9% 151.3M
CoOp 78.2% 77.6% 81.3% 151.4M
CoCoOp 80.1% 79.3% 83.7% 151.5M
ResNet-50 68.5% 67.2% 71.4% 25.6M

Performance Analysis

Performance by Category

Blur

Accuracy 89.2%
F1-Score 87.8%

Noise

Accuracy 91.5%
F1-Score 90.1%

Artifact

Accuracy 84.7%
F1-Score 83.2%

Contrast

Accuracy 86.3%
F1-Score 84.9%

Compression

Accuracy 88.1%
F1-Score 86.5%

Other

Accuracy 82.4%
F1-Score 81%

MedQ-Deg
